title: 🗝️ Archetype Encoding (Chaos as Memory Engine)
name: Archetype Encoding (Chaos as Memory Engine)
what_it_is: Using chaos to encode identity—fractal structures that store archetypes, emotional memory, or mythic pattern as attractor logic.
how_to_use: her spine glows with archetypal attractors—each vertebrae a myth encoded in geometry
his crown contains chaos glyphs—memory-encoded symbols blooming like strange flowers
animation_behavior: Symbols glow based on mood, archetypes flicker into view, memory blooms animate across the skin
